title: probibazo #4264
definition:
1) to cause to go forward, to lean forward, to bring forward,
    drag forward
 2) metaph. to incite, instigate, urge, forward, set on
    2a) to induce by persuasion
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to cause to go forward, to lean forward, to bring forward,
    drag forward
 2) metaph. to incite, instigate, urge, forward, set on
    2a) to induce by persuasion

    NASB:  to lead forward, lead on:
